- Deletes: CollectionGroup, Collection, Product, ProductImage, ProductVariant, ProductNovedades, Order, OrderItem, CartReservation, DiscountCode, NewsletterSubscriber, ContactSubmission
- Keeps: SiteSettings (page settings) intact

I want to create new project, set the directoy up with everything necessary. It will be a Website Hosted on Hetzner, it will shown an own Landing Page of Our "Company called PaGen showing how we effecciently and professionaly we do websites and mainten them (with a ticket service for new features in case any customer wants sth new)", and we will have an admin Page with websites templates for any kind of companies that dont have an website yet on internet: for example online shops, restaurants,...   (We will work on templates one by one on the future). This Templates wont be be only Home Page it wil be everything, DB, all kind of Directories, Email setup, Payment setup (in case needed and customer friendly). Use as example for an online shop sth like Kokett (which could be almost a template and designs for each template for an online shop and also has lots of settings). The Idea is to send the customer link to our subdirectory using its example domain as url slug (which should be available as domain) and the template with working buttons,... and access to the admin page where he can setup products. The Idea is I want you running a terminal for a bot which will look on Google Maps for companies without Website, send them a template, and in case they like it and buy it they get automatically an domain with their domain,db,everything set up.
